text: Lesson 89
For sale
Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

text: Why couldn't Nigel decide?
zh: 奈杰尔为什么无法决定？

text: Good afternoon.
I believe that this house is for sale.
zh: 我相信这栋房子正在出售。

text: That's right.
May I have a look at it, please?
Yes, of course.
Come in.
How long have you lived here?
I've lived here for twenty years.
zh: 我在这儿住了二十年了。

text: Twenty years!
That's a long time.
Yes, I've been here since 1976.
zh: 是啊，我从1976年就住在这儿了。

text: Then why do you want to sell it?
zh: 那您为什么想卖掉它呢？

text: Because I've just retired.
I want to buy a small house in the country.
zh: 我想在乡下买一栋小房子。

text: How much does this house cost?
That's a lot of money!
It's worth every penny of it.
Well, I like the house, but I can't decide yet.
zh: 嗯，我喜欢这栋房子，但我还不能马上决定。

text: My wife must see it first.
Women always have the last word.
zh: 女人总是有最终决定权。
